estimates.note: Held near market. Scored in 2/4 games incl. the last knockout match (competitive, not a blowout) - no drought to suppress.
Real rate 1/4 goal contributions (only vs weakest opponent), 0 assists all tournament. Suppressed well below market.
Hit 1+ SOT in 3/4 games (75%). This is his floor, not his ceiling (2+ SOT is the documented drought stat) - boosted above market.
Derived from H1 exact-goal buckets (149252910) and H2 exact-goal buckets (149252911, Poisson-split for the 2+ bucket). Computed 0.248.

Saves history [1,2,6,5] - bimodal, high vs strong opponents. Spain (10 SOT vs Austria) is Portugal's toughest test yet. Blended market lambda with historical trend -> lambda~3.96, P(>=4)=0.559, shaded to 0.50 for illiquid-market noise.
No direct market. ~9 subs expected combined, total goals expectation ~2.6-2.7; base rate for a sub-scored-goal in a high-sub knockout match.
Last 4 knockout games by these exact teams: 9, 10, 8, 8 regulation subs. Strong repeated precedent just above/at the 9 threshold.

Independence-based compound across Ronaldo/Bruno/Leao/Ramos/Bernardo player markets gave 0.63, but cross-checked against Portugal team-total Over2.5 SOT market (0.596 for team>=3) which requires shot concentration - tempered down to 0.52.
Only 1 of the last 4 relevant games (POR-CRO itself) had a card precede the first goal. Base rate ~30%.
